release_notes: Editing a call's timing after crew are on it now asks confirmed crew to re-confirm the new time, and the call dialog shows an "awaiting re-confirm" badge so you can see who hasn't answered. Standby crew get a lighter "no longer available" opt-out instead. Crew Utilisation day cells now reveal the shift behind them on hover — venue, booking, call name and times. Crew boss can now be set from the booking dialog, with a warning when a change would leave crew without a contact.
